title: तेरी जय हो प्रभु
author: Traditional

scriptureRefs.note: Great is the LORD, and greatly to be praised
Worthy is the Lamb that was slain to receive power

story: A triumphant praise bhajan from the North Indian Christian tradition. This hymn declares the victory and glory of the Lord and is often sung with great energy and joy in congregational worship. Its call-and-response style has made it a favourite at large Christian gatherings and conventions.

lines: तेरी जय हो प्रभु तेरी जय हो
तेरी जय हो प्रभु तेरी जय हो
linesRomanized: Teri jai ho Prabhu teri jai ho
Teri jai ho Prabhu teri jai ho

lines: तू ही सृष्टिकर्ता तू ही पालनहार
तू ही आदि और अंत है
तेरा राज्य सदा सदा का है
तेरी जय हो प्रभु तेरी जय हो
linesRomanized: Tu hi srishtikartaa tu hi paalanhaar
Tu hi aadi aur ant hai
Tera raajya sadaa sadaa ka hai
Teri jai ho Prabhu teri jai ho

lines: तेरी जय हो प्रभु तेरी जय हो
linesRomanized: Teri jai ho Prabhu teri jai ho
